rules.rule_text:
rule catch_intelligence_files
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "21/09/2015"
		description = "catch files"

	strings:
		$meta1 = "National Security Agency"
		$meta3 = "Israeli Secret Intelligence"
		$tag1 = "docx"
		$tag2 = "doc"
		$tag3 = "xls"
		$tag4 = "xlxs"
		$tag5 = "pdf"
		$tag6 = "zip"
		$tag7 = "rar"
		$tag8 = "xlsb"

	condition:
		any of ( $meta* ) and any of ( $tag* )
}

rule FE_PCAPs
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		description = "All pcaps uploaded to VT"
		date = "29/07/2015"

	strings:
		$magic = {D4 C3 B2 A1}

	condition:
		$magic at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: pcap_positives
rule_metadata.author: @abhinavbom
rule_metadata.description: All pcaps uploaded to VT with +3 detection rate

rules.rule_text:
rule pcap_positives
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		description = "All pcaps uploaded to VT with +3 detection rate"
		date = "21/06/2015"

	strings:
		$magic = {D4 C3 B2 A1}

	condition:
		$magic at 0 and positives > 3
}

rule_metadata.name: ek_submissions
rule_metadata.author: @abhinavbom
rule_metadata.description: Detects pcaps uploaded to VT and matches IDS detections for Exploit kits

rules.rule_text:
rule ek_submissions
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		description = "Detects pcaps uploaded to VT and matches IDS detections for Exploit kits"
		date = "23/06/2015"

	strings:
		$magic = {D4 C3 B2 A1}

	condition:
		$magic at 0 and tags contains "exploit-kit"
}

rule_metadata.name: ek_submissions_2
rule_metadata.author: @abhinavbom
rule_metadata.description: Detects pcaps uploaded to VT and matches IDS detections for Exploit kits

rules.rule_text:
rule ek_submissions_2
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		description = "Detects pcaps uploaded to VT and matches IDS detections for Exploit kits"
		date = "23/06/2015"

	strings:
		$magic = {D4 C3 B2 A1}

	condition:
		$magic at 0 and tags contains "exploit-kit" and positives > 3
}
